creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch appears reasonable, thank you for getting around to write it.

Could you link to the changelog(s) for the update so I can include it/them in the commit message?

> Hmm, I just thought that it makes sense to update pkg-message with the info about translation. What do you think?

It's okay.  You could have also added e.g. an NLS option that adds the error messages port as a dependency and amends the sample configuration file to point to it, but this way is good enough.
